meaning: n.疤,痂,不参加罢工的工人,恶棍,工贼vi.结痂,当工贼
examples: Eventually you develop a scab, and then it would fall off as it healed, and you'd be left with a scar.
Will only make the scab pieces come off naturally.
But the single currency remains the scab at which the Tories keep on picking.
"He has a scab on the top of his head but he does appear to be in good health, " he added.
